title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures code mergeability and production quality rather than just test passing. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics applied to tasks sourced from 36 open-source repositories, with results showing Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 performance across multiple subsets.
